reopen_rule: Satisfied lower gates may only be reopened by current regression receipt.
blocking_reasons: B04.R5 proved the router-versus-best-adapter surface on the current head but did not earn router superiority, so learned-router authorization remains blocked.
Lobe promotion, externality widening, external comparative claims, and commercial activation remain blocked by order.
Only governed noncanonical preparation across crucibles, adapters, tournaments, merge, and router-shadow refinement remains open.
